name: github-roadmap
description: Repo-specific GitHub roadmap and issue-management helpers.

interface.shortDescription: Issue, milestone, and project-board helpers for this repo.
interface.longDescription: Supports roadmap issue intake, project-board maintenance, milestone discipline, and GitHub workflow conventions specific to GnuCash NG.
defaultPrompt: Create a roadmap-ready issue from this feature slice.
Triage this idea into issue, roadmap, or current work.
Sync labels, milestone, and project placement for this issue.
